description: Get Ready To Rock Steady! That's the motto of this great Blaze backpack from puma. Spaciously designed, it's a great bag to own. Length: 33 cm Simple design with plenty of room Made of polyester with an EDF backing for easy cleaning and durability Features a two-way zip opening for the main compartment with metal zip pullers Exterior padded laptop compartment Adjustable and padded shoulder straps with nylon webbing and reflective puma logo Front lined zip pocket for mP3 player or cell phone Two front hook and loop straps to store extra gear Two side net pockets to hold water bottles Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
